subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou Who hearest the cries of the oppressed in Thy days and the yearning of the lovers in their separation and remoteness from Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من تسمع ضجیج المظلومین فی ایامک و حنین العاشقین فی هجرک و فراقک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
